title: Mace 2.0 Recipe
description: This datapack changes the recipe for the mace item to include the dragon egg to make it a one time exclusive craft. Primarily meant for SMP servers where the regular mace recipe needs to be disabled to prevent multiple players from having such an OP item.
body: This datapack simply changes the vanilla mace crafting recipe to include the dragon egg in order to make the mace an exclusive item that can only be crafted once. Most useful for servers.
